title: Village Farms Reports Q1 2026 Results Driven by Record International Export Sales
text: Village Farms maintained top five overall market share position in Canadian market and held number one market share position in dried flower. Pure Sunfarms brand expanded its market share position for the 15th consecutive month in April. Consolidated Net Sales increased 27% to $50.2 Million with Net Income of $2.9 Million or $0.03 Per Share. Cannabis gross margin reached 43%, surpassing targeted 30%-40% range and increasing from prior year's 39%. International export sales from Canada increased 171% year-over-year to a record high of $14.6 million. Company believes it remains the largest exporter of medical cannabis to Europe, with three of the top five leading cultivars in Germany and four of the top 10 through distribution partners.
